_note: Ground-truth values for the fixture in query-history-fixture.csv. The pct fields are asserted by crates/melt-audit/tests/fixture.rs within ±2 pp; the rest is reference-only.

routable_conservative._note_top_n: with default --top-n 20 and 3 tables in the fixture, conservative collapses to static; this is intentional to keep the assertion stable. The dedicated top-N test in tests/fixture.rs flexes top_n=1 separately.
